texto: Dolls fire our collective imagination, for better and - too often - for worse. From life-size dolls the same height as the little girls who carry them, to dolls whose long hair can 'grow' longer, to Barbie and her fashionable sisters, dolls do double duty as child's play and the focus of adult art and adult fear.
explicacao: Citação de Ellen Datlow sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Dolls fire our collective imagination, for better and - too often - for worse. From life-size dol…” articula familia, art, focus em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como focus e imagination.
